nasb.text: Everyone kept feeling a sense of awe; and many wonders and signs were taking place through the apostles.

esv.text: And awe came upon every soul, and many wonders and signs were being done through the apostles.

cnv.text: 使徒行了許多奇事神蹟，眾人就都懼怕。

ccb.text: 大家都满心敬畏上帝。使徒又行了很多神迹奇事。

csbs.text: 每个人都起了敬畏之心。使徒们又行了很多奇事和神迹。
